Patch Set 2:

> > Failed enforced test custom-101 on CentOS 7.0/x86_64
 > > Trevis Autotest retesting enforced custom session for build
 > 70805.
 > > Requested by S Buisson because of LU-10870.
 > 
 > The LU-10870 failure is exactly what this patch is intended to fix?

In this test session that failed, there was only one MDS. So this must be a different issue with tests 40, as this patch aims at setting fail_loc on all MDS nodes in case of DNE.

Patch Set 2:

It seems sanityn is not robust enough to be launched several times in a row. The failed tests only appear after the third or fourth execution in the same instance. I have retriggered the failed sessions to try to have them pass finally, as this patch makes sense anyway.

parents.subject: LU-13004 ptlrpc: remove *GET*KVEC macros and fields.

commit.subject: LU-13097 tests: set fail_loc on all MDS nodes for pdir tests
commit.message:
LU-13097 tests: set fail_loc on all MDS nodes for pdir tests

Set fail_loc on all MDS nodes for pdir tests, not only $SINGLEMDS.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn,sanityn
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I80d935eae0b06e39712abfe48a56b8ce08537926
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/37145
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
